Description: AI detects the player based on line-of-sight & sound.
Example Use Case: AI spots the player sneaking and reacts.

Description: AI belongs to factions with changing reputation.
Example Use Case: Helping a faction makes them friendly.

Description: AI squads have leaders that issue commands.
Example Use Case: Leader directs troops to take cover.

Description: AI can hear or see player actions.
AI moves toward the player if hostile.
Example Use Case: A squad charges after seeing an attack.

Description: AI searches last known player location if lost.
Example Use Case: PMCs move toward where noise was heard.

Description: AI moves to cover instead of standing in the open.
Example Use Case: AI hides behind debris before shooting.

Description: AI reacts differently based on noise & visibility.
Example Use Case: Crouching makes the player harder to see.

Description: AI squads use voice lines dynamically.
